text: They can learn the uniportal baths technique from lectures, coming to the OR where they can observe about 50-60 cases per day and also coming to the wet lab where they can perform the uniportal baths themselves under our supervision.
Impressed about the technique and the whole course is so many people coming from all over the world to Shanghai Pulmonary Hospital in order to get experience.
87 cases the first day when I looked at the program and I was able to move from room to room to be able to see the different cases.
This is the best course on training in vasodilatomy all around the world I think.
It is an experience that changed the surgical perception.
